discussion_posts.name: fahad_Mubeen
discussion_posts.content: Use \'long long\' for calculating the sum; otherwise, it will result in a runtime error due to integer overflow.

discussion_posts.name: tin_le
discussion_posts.content: Binary search is unnecessary, O(n) is enough

discussion_posts.name: Satansoft
discussion_posts.content: For maximum efficiency calculate **useful k** as `k = k % sum of chalk` for cases when `k >= sum of chalk`.
